planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: Memo intermediate calculations match spreadsheet computed cells; recomputed values documented and rounded to 1 decimal place; verifier recomputation yields identical numbers.
planned_changes.description: Recompute residual_risk values using the documented formula and correct rounding. Update both memo intermediate-calculation table and spreadsheet computed cells.

planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: Pseudocode and decision table reflect corrected mapping; sample rows show expected action per failed control.
planned_changes.description: Correct remediation-action mapping in pseudocode and all recommendation outputs so MFA failure => enforce_phishing_resistant, legacy_auth failure => block_legacy, risky_signins failure => remove_inactive.

planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: Provided CSV reproduces the memo values; formula listing includes sheet names and cell references for all intermediate calculations; no computed value is hard-coded without formula trace.
planned_changes.description: Ensure spreadsheet uses explicit formula cells for all computed metrics; add an additional 'formulas.txt' sheet or separate text file listing key cell formulas and an exported CSV of computed columns.

planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: Reconciliation section contains row-level citations mapping memo numbers to spreadsheet cells and demonstrates exact formula outputs.
planned_changes.description: Add a reconciliation/audit section in the memo showing side-by-side: memo computation, spreadsheet cell reference, and computed value for each group and metric.

planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: Verification snippet reproduces spreadsheet/memo values when run against included CSV; instructions for running/purpose provided in memo.
planned_changes.description: Include a small verification artifact (CSV plus a short Python snippet or pseudocode) that recomputes residual risk from the CSV so graders without openpyxl can verify calculations.

planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: Sensitivity tables updated; if final decisions change, memo explains why; validation checks in the spreadsheet flag missing/invalid inputs.
planned_changes.description: Rerun sensitivity checks and validation rules after fixes; update the memo's sensitivity matrix and interpretations.

raw_model_output.revision_reason: Correct arithmetic and mapping errors, make spreadsheet formulas auditable, and provide verifiable recomputation artifacts so semantic correctness can be confirmed.

metadata_json.revision_goal: The deliverables meet artifact-contract requirements, but contain substantive semantic errors: (1) residual-risk arithmetic in the memo (G2 and G3) does not match the stated formula; (2) the pseudocode incorrectly maps failed controls to remediation actions (MFA and legacy actions are swapped); and (3) the spreadsheet (.xlsx) could not be parsed in the grader environment (openpyxl missing), so formulas were not independently verifiable. These issues reduce semantic correctness and require a focused revision to recompute/confirm numbers, correct mappings, and ensure spreadsheet formulas are auditable.
